Create account
==============

Screen: `/createAccount`

`CreateAccount` page collects first name, last name, email and password then posts to `/create-account`.

Service
-------

`frontend/features/authen/services/account_services.dart::CreateService.createAccount`

Request
~~~~~~~
- POST http://localhost:5000/create-account
- Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
- Fields: user_fname, user_lname, user_email, user_password

Response
~~~~~~~~
- 201 with JSON {"user_id": ...} on success.
